subjectTemplate: IFPA: confirm this was your footbag.org email address
bodyTemplate:
You (or someone signed in to an IFPA Footbag account) told us this email address was used on the old footbag.org site.

If that was you, open the link below WHILE SIGNED IN to your IFPA account to confirm you still control this mailbox. The link expires in {ttlPhrase}.

{verifyUrl}

If this was not you, you can ignore this message.
